text:
I've got an e-mail, stating that this PR is closed with the following 
reason:

Followup to previous PR

Unfortunately, this PR is maked confidential and that makes it 
inaccessible through the
Web interface. I am still tripping over this problem on each and every 
machine where
rep-gtlk + sawfish have to be upgraded.
